---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for GameForge
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem it Solves
Describe the problem or use case this feature would address.
Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 🚀 Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? Describe them here.

## 🧱 Module Affected
Which GameForge module would this feature belong to?
- [ ] SingletonNode
- [ ] EventBus
- [ ] State Machine (FSM)
- [ ] Toast UI
- [ ] Dialogue Manager
- [ ] New Module
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 📋 Example Usage
If possible, provide a code example of how you'd like to use this feature:

```gdscript
# Example code here
```

## 🎨 UI/UX Mockups
If applicable, add mockups or diagrams to illustrate the feature.

## 📝 Additional Context
Add any other context, links, or references about the feature request here.

## ⚖️ Impact
How would this feature benefit the GameForge community?
- [ ] Improves developer experience
- [ ] Adds new capabilities
- [ ] Fixes architectural limitation
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Other: ___________
